title: Gondwana tragedy: CEO named as victim of elephant trampling
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The man who died from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The man who died from being trampled by an elephant at Gondwana Private Game Reserve yesterday morning, 22 July, has been identified as the reserve’s CEO and co-owner, FC Conradie (39).","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The man who died from being trampled by an elephant at Gondwana Private Game Reserve yesterday morning, 22 July, has been identified as the reserve’s CEO and co-owner, FC Conradie (39)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Conradie, a husband, a father to three young children and a friend to many, was trampled at about 08:00 yesterday. The emergency medical services declared him dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said yesterday that an inquest docket had been opened and that an investigation was launched.","html":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said yesterday that an inquest docket had been opened and that an investigation was launched."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A representative of the reserve and a close friend of the Conradie family, who asked not to be named, said all the employees at the reserve send their condolences to Conradie’s family.","html":"A representative of the reserve and a close friend of the Conradie family, who asked not to be named, said all the employees at the reserve send their condolences to Conradie’s family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on sister publication, www.mosselbayadvertiser.com","html":"Read more on sister publication, www.mosselbayadvertiser.com"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Gondwana tragedy: CEO named as victim of elephant trampling
